reasoning: The question asks if the Global Protest Tracker will record a US protest of 10,000+ participants between the question launch (mid-April 2025) and July 1, 2025. The Tracker focuses on major anti-government protests. While the US sees occasional massive protests, especially around inaugurations (January 2025 had the People's March), generating a new 10,000+ person anti-government protest in the remaining 2.5 months of this window (mid-April to end of June) without a scheduled major event is unlikely. The Tracker also doesn't update continuously (last spotted update was Nov 2024), and may have specific inclusion/exclusion criteria that omit typical annual marches (like Pride) unless they are strictly anti-government. Given the narrow time window and lack of currently identified major planned protests, the probability is relatively low.
